_comment: Root workspace commands live here so the frontend and backend can be managed together.
name: travel-reimbursement-system

scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @travel-reimbursement/shared && concurrently "npm run dev --workspace frontend" "npm run dev --workspace backend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @travel-reimbursement/shared && npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
